project_memories.content: Fixed race condition in upload handler by locking the temp file writer.
Upload throughput improved after increasing worker count and removing lock contention in the preview generator.
A UI race appears when the upload progress component rerenders during reconnect.

cases.name: sqlite decision should beat nearby distractors

project_memories.content: Chose SQLite over Postgres for simplicity in the local CLI prototype.
SQLite migration performance improved after batching writes in the import path.
The local CLI now logs structured JSON for import progress and retry decisions.

project_memories.content: Upload retry policy uses exponential backoff up to 30 seconds.
Upload retry policy now caps backoff at 5 seconds to preserve snappy UX.

project_memories.content: Always use eager loading for UserList queries to avoid N+1 fetches.
User profile queries should cache avatar lookups for 30 seconds.
List sorting changed to newest-first for activity feed pagination.
